title: Funky Energizing Korean Enchilada Wrapped Jjigae
description: A bold, energizing fusion of Korean flavors and crunchy textures, wrapped in a whole30-friendly enchilada-style ssam.

ingredients.name: Double-Fried Chicken (KFC-style)
ingredients.notes: baked and air-fried for crispy texture, using whole30-friendly marinade

ingredients.name: Korean Chili Flakes (gochugaru)
ingredients.notes: adjust to taste, adds spicy kick

ingredients.name: Gochujang
ingredients.notes: fermented Korean chili paste, adds depth and umami

ingredients.name: Ssam Wrap ( collard greens or lettuce)
Green Onion, thinly sliced
ingredients.notes: adds crunchy texture and onion flavor

ingredients.name: Toasted Sesame Seeds
ingredients.notes: adds nutty flavor and crunchy texture

ingredients.name: Sesame Oil
ingredients.notes: used for wrapping, adds sesame flavor

instructions: Prepare homemade enchilada sauce according to recipe or use store-bought, ensuring it's whole30-friendly.
